accepted.reason: Depth-bucket grouping with max-depth tracking is compact structural loop logic useful for conversion tasks.
Accumulator-based baseline restoration is a strong streaming signal-processing kernel with stateful updates.
HMM forward recursion and log-sum-exp normalization are high-value probabilistic DP kernels.
LFSR state-transition logic and Geffe combiner add concise bit-level sequence generation patterns.
Mandelbrot escape iteration is a classic arithmetic loop benchmark with clear optimization behavior.
Mini-batch SGD update loops provide practical ML optimization kernels for conversion training.
Floyd-Warshall with footprint reconstruction is a canonical dynamic-programming shortest-path kernel.
